history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays a screenshot of a mobile application, likely a video-sharing platform, showing a feed with code snippets and user comments. The top portion of the screen shows the time "05.36" and network status indicators. Below that, there's a display of what appears to be XML code, with tags like `<property name="evolution" type="float">` and similar structures related to "seed" and "scatter." Further down, there are interaction buttons for comments (58), likes (196), and plays (2.651). The comments section includes two entries: one user states "Akun Ini Direhatkan Sementara xml kol di ss sih bro kalau gua malu tuh 😂" (This account is temporarily restricted, if you screenshot the XML, bro, you'll be embarrassed 😂), and another user, "Ryzn," asks "perasaan selama ngedit ga ada rumus code begitu, atau preset kah? 🥺" (My feeling during editing, there isn't a code formula like that, or is it a preset? 🥺). The overall content is related to video editing, presets, and code, with no explicit or suggestive material present.
